title: fossil fuels India Germeny Relationship Philipp Ackermann German Ambassador
description: എണ്ണ വാതക വിതരണം തടസ്സപെടുന്ന സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ ഫോസില്‍ ഇന്ധനങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നത് അവസാനിപ്പിക്കാൻ നിർദ്ദേശിച്ച് ഇന്ത്യയിലെ ജർമ്മൻ സ്ഥാനപതി ഫിലിപ്പ് അക്കർമാൻ.

title: F1 obsessed scientists name ancient wasp species after Oscar Piastri
description: The biologists just couldn’t help themselves after they found the preserved, ancient species.

title: 'Wasn't expecting that one': Ancient wasp named after Piastri
description: Australia's Formula 1 hero might be the first athlete to ever have an ancient wasp named after him, and he has reacted with surprise.

title: New F1 buzz: Ancient wasp species named after Oscar Piastri
description: The newly discovered species of wasp dates to ‌the time of the dinosaurs and was found ‌preserved in Burmese amber.

title: New F1 buzz: ancient wasp species named after Piastri
description: The motor-racing world is abuzz for another reason on Friday with three biologists naming an ancient wasp species named after 25-year-old Oscar Piastri.
